name: vibeproof
description: Scan before your AI runs it.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/rules packages/core packages/scanners packages/verifier packages/report packages/orchestrator packages/ai-providers packages/cli && npm run typecheck -w @vibeproof/web
scripts.build: tsc -b packages/rules packages/core packages/scanners packages/verifier packages/report packages/orchestrator packages/ai-providers packages/cli && npm run build -w @vibeproof/web
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
